name: IdsCapLfstylRateFctrUpdt

text.value: INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CAP (CAP_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK) SELECT CAP.CAP_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CAP CAP, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF MBR_LFSTYL_BNF, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR WHERE MBR_LFSTYL_BNF.MBR_SK = CAP.MBR_SK AND MBR_LFSTYL_BNF.EFF_DT_SK <= CAP.ERN_DT_SK AND MBR_LFSTYL_BNF.TERM_DT_SK >= CAP.ERN_DT_SK AND MBR_LFSTYL_BNF.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK = LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK AND LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID = LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD AND LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT <= CAP.ERN_DT_SK AND LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT >= CAP.ERN_DT_SK AND SUBSTRING(CAP.CAP_FUND_ID, 3, 2) = LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD AND CAP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle}

Description:

DESCRIPTION:  Extracts latest run cycle data and updates the LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK field with the appropriate value

IdsCapLfstylRateFctrUpdt
